summary: Iteration 138: Sopralluoghi & Messa a Norma AI Module - ALL 27 TESTS PASS. Verified CRUD, photo upload/download to object storage, article catalog auto-seeding (14 defaults), and validation for AI analysis/preventivo generation. Fixed CRITICAL route ordering bug where /articoli-catalogo was being matched by /{sopralluogo_id} path parameter.

sopralluoghi_crud.create: PASS - Creates sopralluogo with auto-generated document_number (SOP-YYYY/NNNN)
sopralluoghi_crud.list: PASS - Returns paginated list with search and status filters
sopralluoghi_crud.get_by_id: PASS - Returns single sopralluogo by ID
sopralluoghi_crud.delete: PASS - Deletes sopralluogo and returns 404 on subsequent get

photo_upload_download.upload_jpeg: PASS - Uploads JPEG to object storage, returns foto_id and storage_path
photo_upload_download.upload_png: PASS - Uploads PNG to object storage
photo_upload_download.download_photo: PASS - Downloads photo from object storage via /foto/{path}

articoli_catalogo.list_auto_seed: PASS - Auto-seeds 14 default articles on first access
articoli_catalogo.required_fields: PASS - Articles have articolo_id, codice, descrizione, prezzo_base, unita, keyword_ai, categoria

ai_analysis_validation.requires_photos: PASS - Returns 400 'Carica almeno una foto prima di analizzare' when no photos

preventivo_generation_validation.requires_analysis: PASS - Returns 400 'Esegui prima l'analisi AI' when no analysis done

features_verified.end_to_end_workflow: PASS - Create -> List -> Upload Photo -> Verify analysis validation

route_ordering_bug.description: CRITICAL: /articoli-catalogo endpoint was being matched by /{sopralluogo_id} path parameter route (returned 404 'Sopralluogo non trovato')
route_ordering_bug.fix: Moved articoli-catalogo routes BEFORE /{sopralluogo_id} routes in sopralluogo.py

critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering fix was critical - FastAPI matches routes in order of definition
Object storage integration with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY working correctly
Photo upload correctly validates content type (JPEG/PNG/WEBP only) and max size (10MB)
Article catalog auto-seeding with 14 default safety/automation articles works correctly
AI analysis and preventivo generation endpoints have proper validation gates
seed_data_creation: 14 default articoli_perizia auto-seeded on first catalog access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sopralluoghi module fully tested. Route ordering bug fixed. AI analysis endpoint calls GPT-4o Vision when photos are present - tests avoid calling it by using fresh sopralluoghi without photos. Object storage via Emergent integrations working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration138_sopralluogo_module.py.
note_on_gpt4o: AI analysis endpoint (POST /api/sopralluoghi/{id}/analizza) DOES call GPT-4o Vision when photos are present. Tests only verify validation (requires photos) to avoid API costs.
